what: Detect whether the project directory is a Git repository by checking for a .git folder
why: Determine Git status so downstream features (vault sync, hooks) can adapt behavior for Git vs non-Git projects

output.console: Boolean flag indicating whether the project is a Git repository

success_handling.criteria: Successfully checked for .git directory existence and returned is_git boolean

decisions.outcome: Set is_git to true, proceed to init-nori-dir step

decisions.condition: .git directory does not exist at project root
decisions.outcome: Set is_git to false, proceed to init-nori-dir step
